hero.headline: Pool Problems? *We Actually Show Up*
hero.subheadline: When other companies are too busy or quote you crazy prices, we're the ones who answer the phone and fix what's broken.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Pool Service That Works
services_section.subheading: From weekly maintenance to leak detection — we have the equipment and know-how

services.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
services.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, and vacuuming. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Professional equipment to find and fix leaks fast. No guesswork, no plugging jets — real repairs.

services.title: Equipment Repair
services.description: Pumps, filters, heaters — when your pool equipment quits, we get it running again.

services.title: Pool Maintenance
services.description: Regular service to keep everything balanced and working. Reliable scheduling you can count on.

about.heading: Gainesville Pool Service Done Right
about.body: We're the pool team that shows up when we say we will. No excuses, no runarounds — just straight answers and real repairs.

reviews.name: Lilly S.
reviews.text: Alec is our go-to guy! Love not having to worry about keeping the pool clean and chemicals balanced. Always professional and they've fixed several issues for us.

reviews.name: Pete R.
reviews.text: Said what he was going to do and delivered. Other companies just plugged jets — VIP had the real equipment to detect, find and repair our leak professionally.

reviews.name: Chrissy C.
reviews.text: Called multiple pool services for quotes. Some weren't interested, others had outrageous pricing. Found this gem and Jose was absolutely amazing.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving North Central Florida
service_areas.subheading: Pool service throughout Gainesville and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready for Pool Service That Actually Shows Up?
cta.body: Get an honest quote from a local team that knows pools. No runarounds, no crazy pricing — just straight talk and real results.
